name: Gladia
description: Create asynchronous speech-to-text jobs from accessible audio URLs and retrieve transcription results, metadata, diarization, subtitles, translations, and optional audio-intelligence outputs through Gladia V2.

auth.hint: Create a Gladia API key and send it in the x-gladia-key header. Store only the key value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: create_pre_recorded_transcription
tools.description: Create an asynchronous transcription job from a publicly reachable or previously uploaded audio URL and return the job identifier and result URL.

params.name: audio_url
params.description: URL of the audio or video to transcribe; upload local files separately because this endpoint accepts URLs in JSON.

params.name: diarization
params.description: Enable speaker diarization in the result.

params.name: subtitles
params.description: Enable subtitle generation; configure detailed formats with subtitles_config when needed.

params.name: summarization
params.description: Enable generation of a summary alongside the transcription.

params.name: language_config
params.description: Language selection and code-switching configuration; omit languages to use automatic detection.

params.name: custom_metadata
params.description: Caller-defined metadata retained with the transcription for later organization and filtering.

tools.name: get_pre_recorded_transcription
tools.description: Get a pre-recorded job's status, request parameters, file metadata, and completed transcription or audio-intelligence results.

params.name: id
params.description: UUID returned when the pre-recorded transcription job was created.
